zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristowe於1390年之前與Sir Hugh Bristowe在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristowe于1390年之前与Sir Hugh Bristowe在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Bristowe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bristow
meanings: habitational name from the city of Bristol, named in Old English with brycg ‘bridge’ + stōw ‘assembly place’. Bristow was the usual spoken form until at least the 17th century, but from the 12th century clerks had frequently spelled the name Bristol(lia), using an inverted Anglo-Norman French spelling of -ol- for -ou-. The written form Bristol gradually replaced Bristow as the usual pronunciation.
habitational name from Burstow or Bristow Farm in Frimley (both in Surrey), both meaning ‘the fortified place’ from Old English burh ‘fortified (place)’ + stōw ‘assembly place’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristowe married Sir Hugh Bristowe before 1390, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristowe a épousé Sir Hugh Bristowe avant 1390, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristowe hat vor 1390 in England Sir Hugh Bristowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristowe lei sposato Sir Hugh Bristowe prima del 1390, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristoweは1390年以前にイギリスでSir Hugh Bristoweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristowe(은)는 1390년 이전 영국에서 Sir Hugh Bristowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristowe casou-se com Sir Hugh Bristowe antes 1390, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristowe вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Bristowe перед 1390 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Hugh Bristowe se casó con Sir Hugh Bristowe antes de 1390, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
